extortion.description: [AI generated] Daycohost is a Latin American company specializing in comprehensive IT services. Headquartered in Caracas, Venezuela, the company offers a wide range of services including cloud storage, colocation, managed hosting, data recovery and cybersecurity solutions. The goal of Daycohost is to support and guide businesses in their digital transformation process. It is an ISO 9001: 2008 certified company known for providing secure and reliable services.
